title: Music Disk MAYHEM
description: Replaces Minecraft’s vanilla music disks with custom tracks composed by PYRO_.
body:
![Title of Data Pack "Music Disk MAYHEM"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/932b6f33788ef3fbd202b22f26c9f330ed60cf21_0.webp)

Music Disk MAYHEM swaps out Minecraft’s vanilla music disks for new, original tracks by PYRO_. No extra crafting or new items — drop a replaced disk into any jukebox and your world gets fresh, hand-made music.


Features

Replaces vanilla music disks with original audio

Files integrated so jukebox plays new tracks normally

Compatible with singleplayer, servers, and maps

Tested on Minecraft 1.21 (and backwards compatible)



Music Credits

All music in this project was composed by PYRO_ on Flat.io.

You can listen to all published works here:
https://flat.io/@pyro_/published

One track in this datapack was a collaboration with @fluteguy (https://flat.io/@fluteguy/published).

[DISCLAIMER] Some of the default ambient tracks may be missing or mixed up.
